zh.Utkinton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾武特金頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Beeston於1478年出生在英國爾貝斯頓時，他的父親Tochett De Beeston29歲，母親Joan Donne28歲。他於1495年與Katherine Calveley在英國英格蘭爾武特金頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年4月26日在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.Utkinton, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾武特金頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Beeston于1478年出生在英国爾貝斯頓时，他的父亲Tochett De Beeston29岁，母亲Joan Donne28岁。他于1495年与Katherine Calveley在英国英格兰爾武特金頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年4月26日在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beeston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of the many places in England so called. Those in Nottinghamshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire were settlements where bent grass grew (Old English bēos ‘rough grass’ + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’). In Bedfordshire it probably denoted a settlement on a bend (Old English byge + genitive singular -es + tūn). The hamlet stands on a marked bend of the river Yvel. In Cheshire it is named from a rock, below which trading took place (Old English byge ‘commerce’ + Old English stān ‘stone’). The reference is to a prominent crag where the remains of Beeston Castle stand. Compare Beaston and Beeson .
occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived in that part of a village known in Middle English as bi este toun ‘(place) at the east (end) of the village’.

variants.name: Beston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   and   Beaston  .

variants.name: Beeson
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston  , a habitational name from a place called Beeston. The spelling reflects the local pronunciation of the Nottinghamshire placename, although this form is now quite widespread in England.

variants.name: Beaston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   (the more common form of the surname in England), a habitational name from any of various places called Beeston.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Beeston was born in 1478, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, his father, Tochett De Beeston, was 29 and his mother, Joan Donne, was 28. He married Katherine Calveley in 1495, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 April 1543, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Beeston est né en 1478, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Tochett De Beeston, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Donne, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Calveley en 1495, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1543, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Beeston 1478 in Beeston, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tochett De Beeston 29 und seine Mutter Joan Donne 28. Er hat 1495 in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Calveley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. April 1543 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Beeston è nato il nel 1478 nel Beeston, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Tochett De Beeston, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan Donne, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Calveley nel 1495, nel Utkinton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 aprile 1543, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Beestonが1478年にイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで生まれた時，父Tochett De Beestonは29歳，母Joan Donneは28歳であった。1495年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントンでKatherine Calveleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年4月26日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Beeston(이)가 1478년 영국 체실르 브이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tochett De Beeston(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Donne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 우트킨턴에서 Katherine Calveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 4월 26일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Beeston nasceu em 1478, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Tochett De Beeston, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Donne, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Calveley em 1495, em Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1543, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Beeston родился в 1478 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Tochett De Beeston было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Donne, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Calveley в 1495 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 апреля 1543 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Beeston nació en 1478, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Tochett De Beeston, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Donne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Katherine Calveley en 1495, en Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de abril de 1543, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
